testcase.name: test_widget_ids_match_employees_list_ids

failure.message: AssertionError: Line-Manager widget IDs do NOT match /api/employees ids (widget rows will navigate to wrong /employees/<id> URL): [('James Kamau', '9e19b14f-42eb-4b93-b339-777d9efc18b2', '6a0317a53cab1d886500984b'), ('Robert Kiprotich', '77f21c55-a01f-469a-ae44-656c66499adf', '6a0317a53cab1d886500984e')] assert not [('James Kamau', '9e19b14f-42eb-4b93-b339-777d9efc18b2', '6a0317a53cab1d886500984b'), ('Robert Kiprotich', '77f21c55-a01f-469a-ae44-656c66499adf', '6a0317a53cab1d886500984e')]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_14.py:166: in test_widget_ids_match_employees_list_ids assert not mismatches, ( E AssertionError: Line-Manager widget IDs do NOT match /api/employees ids (widget rows will navigate to wrong /employees/<id> URL): [('James Kamau', '9e19b14f-42eb-4b93-b339-777d9efc18b2', '6a0317a53cab1d886500984b'), ('Robert Kiprotich', '77f21c55-a01f-469a-ae44-656c66499adf', '6a0317a53cab1d886500984e')] E assert not [('James Kamau', '9e19b14f-42eb-4b93-b339-777d9efc18b2', '6a0317a53cab1d886500984b'), ('Robert Kiprotich', '77f21c55-a01f-469a-ae44-656c66499adf', '6a0317a53cab1d886500984e')]

testcase.name: test_employees_list_does_not_leak_mongodb_id

failure.message: AssertionError: /api/employees response leaks Mongo _id for: ['David Ochieng', 'James Kamau', 'Robert Kiprotich'] assert not ['David Ochieng', 'James Kamau', 'Robert Kiprotich']

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_14.py:176: in test_employees_list_does_not_leak_mongodb_id assert not leaks, f"/api/employees response leaks Mongo _id for: {leaks}" E AssertionError: /api/employees response leaks Mongo _id for: ['David Ochieng', 'James Kamau', 'Robert Kiprotich'] E assert not ['David Ochieng', 'James Kamau', 'Robert Kiprotich']
